signal_evidence.credit_quality_trend: The gap between the newer cohort curve and the 2017 cohort curve widened by 8 basis points during the fourth quarter. In fact, this gap has widened in each of the past 6 quarters since we began measurement.
signal_evidence.capex_direction: We will continue to invest heavily to make our existing products even better... we're at least 30% annual revenue growth compounded between 2025 and 2028.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: Our personal loan borrowers have a weighted average income of $158,000 and a weighted average FICO score of 746... we closed $100 million of sales in whole loan form at a blended execution of 106.5%.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: I've never been more optimistic about our prospects than I am today... I am more excited about what lies ahead than I have ever been at SoFi.
